Off Calendar Oct-03-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearance:
Philip Borowsky, Esq., for Millie Pocoroba, Plaintiff and Moving Party
Cherie J. Herman, Esq., for Anthony Pignati, Esq., Defendant and Opposing Party

Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff Millie Pocoroba's Motion To Compel Answers To Deposition Questions is granted. The court finds that the questions would lead to admissible evidence. By this ruling, the court does not make any ruling regarding the admissibility of the letters into evidence. All requests for sanctions are denied. Order signed in open court. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
